blocks.content: His name was Daniel Snyder. I found that out about six minutes before he found me.
Two girls near the water fountain: 'He does that to everybody new. Just ignore it.' They said it to each other. Not to me. I was just standing there close enough to hear.
That's not a greeting. That's a stop sign.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: You came in with Michaels this morning.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Michaels is that dude. Whole school's gonna know his name by Friday.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Cool. But what are you though? Like what's your thing?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: What do you mean what's my thing?

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Michaels plays ball. Wide receiver, everybody knows. So what are you?
People nearby. Not watching directly. But aware. First day and already this is the test.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: I don't know what you are yet.

blocks.prompt: Daniel is waiting. The hallway is listening.

options.label: "Figure it out." Don't let him take this.
